name: Apple Scones
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Cold apple juice or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix together dry ingredients. Cut in shortening as you would for a pie crust. Stir in apples and raisins. Add enough juice to make a stiff dough.
3. On a floured surface, roll the dough about 1/2 inch thick. Cut into triangles.
4. Bake on a cookie sheet for 10 minutes, or until light brown.
